[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [layering](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeLayer](../../TextmodeLayer.md) / ortho

# Method: ortho()

```ts
ortho(near?, far?): void;
```

Enable orthographic projection for this layer.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type |
| ------ | ------ |
| `near?` | `number` |
| `far?` | `number` |

## Returns

`void`
